title: Fix Settings page functionality

requirements.text: Audit and fix the Settings page (frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx) to ensure all settings controls are fully functional: the Gemini API key input field must correctly read the stored key from the backend, save it on submit, and display validation feedback; the default timeframe selector (M1/M5/M10) must load the persisted value and update it via the backend mutation; the AI sensitivity slider must load and save correctly; the theme toggle must apply the selected theme immediately; and the daily operation limit selector must load the current value and trigger the setDailyOperationLimit mutation on change. All save actions must show a Portuguese success or error toast.
acceptanceCriteria: Gemini API key field loads the existing stored key on page open and saves changes to the backend on submit
API key save shows 'Chave salva com sucesso!' toast on success and a Portuguese error message on failure
Default timeframe selector (M1/M5/M10) reflects the persisted value from backend settings on load
Changing the timeframe selector persists the new value via the backend mutation
AI sensitivity slider loads current value from backend settings and saves on change
Theme toggle correctly applies dark/light theme immediately via ThemeContext and persists preference
Daily operation limit selector (3/4/6/8) loads current value from backend settings and calls setDailyOperationLimit mutation on change
All setting controls display loading states while fetching data from the backend
All save actions show appropriate Portuguese feedback toasts (success or error)

requirements.text: Audit and fix frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts and frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure the backend actor calls for getSettings, updateSettings, getGeminiApiKey, setGeminiApiKey, getDailyOperationProgress, and setDailyOperationLimit are correctly wired. Verify that the Motoko function signatures in backend/main.mo match the frontend call signatures and fix any mismatches that would cause settings to fail silently.
acceptanceCriteria: useSettings hook returns settings data without errors when the backend is available
updateSettings mutation successfully persists changes to the backend
getGeminiApiKey and setGeminiApiKey calls resolve without errors
getDailyOperationProgress and setDailyOperationLimit calls resolve without errors
Any mismatches between Motoko function signatures and frontend call arguments are corrected

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Maintain all existing Portuguese (Brazil) UI text
Preserve all existing features and analysis history functionality
Do not change the backend data schema in a breaking way; use migration.mo if schema changes are needed
nonGoals: Adding new settings options beyond those already designed
Changing the visual design of the Settings page
Modifying the Gemini API analysis logic
Changing the Results or History pages
